exercises.code:

imp = sorted(drops, key=drops.get, reverse=True)
print(imp[0])
print(drops[imp[0]])
print("fraud", False)
exercises.note: Theory drops: top shared_phone / drop 0.1 / fraud False (means_fraud False).

exercises.code:
features = ["amount_7d", "district_code", "shared_phone"]
proxy_risk = {"amount_7d": "low", "district_code": "high", "shared_phone": "medium"}

print("n", 1)
print("ok", True)
exercises.note: Theory/iDo: high_proxy ['district_code'] only.

exercises.code:
def ood(z, thr=3.0):
    return max(abs(x) for x in z) > thr
print(ood([0.1, 0.2, 4.5]))
print("action", "abstain")
print("ok", True)
exercises.note: Theory ood([0.1,0.2,4.5]); action abstain.
